title: Comparing Fractions
instruction: Complete the explanation of comparing fractions.
passage: To compare fractions, find a common ___. Compare 2/3 and 3/4: LCD is ___. 2/3 = 8/12. 3/4 = ___/12. Since 9 > 8, ___ is the larger fraction. As percentages: 2/3 ≈ 66.7%, 3/4 = ___%, confirming 3/4 is larger.
